item.title: Peterbilt Drag Truck Build
item.description: Follow the build of a custom Peterbilt drag truck, showcasing fabrication, performance upgrades, and the work that goes into creating a powerful competition-ready machine. Which part of the build interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Peterbilt Drag Truck Build
media:content.media:description: Follow the build of a custom Peterbilt drag truck, showcasing fabrication, performance upgrades, and the work that goes into creating a powerful competition-ready machine. Which part of the build interests you most?

item.title: The 3.9 Perkins Finally Woke Up
item.description: A few stubborn gremlins stood in the way as the little diesel came back to life. A hands-on restoration and mechanical troubleshooting session with the 3.9 Perkins. What would you check first?

media:content.media:title: The 3.9 Perkins Finally Woke Up
media:content.media:description: A few stubborn gremlins stood in the way as the little diesel came back to life. A hands-on restoration and mechanical troubleshooting session with the 3.9 Perkins. What would you check first?

item.title: Diagnosing a Triton V10 Engine
item.description: A mechanic investigates issues with a Triton V10 engine, demonstrating diagnostic techniques and troubleshooting steps to identify the problem. The video offers insight into the vehicle repair process. What engine diagnostic tip has helped you the most?

media:content.media:title: Diagnosing a Triton V10 Engine
media:content.media:description: A mechanic investigates issues with a Triton V10 engine, demonstrating diagnostic techniques and troubleshooting steps to identify the problem. The video offers insight into the vehicle repair process. What engine diagnostic tip has helped you the most?

item.title: Water Test
item.description: We had to find out if this unusual setup would actually move water. A simple mechanical test with a restoration focus and a satisfying result. Would you try a setup like this?

media:content.media:title: Water Test
media:content.media:description: We had to find out if this unusual setup would actually move water. A simple mechanical test with a restoration focus and a satisfying result. Would you try a setup like this?

item.title: Rust to Running Mustang
item.description: Follow the transformation of a classic Ford Mustang from a rusted project into a running vehicle. The video highlights restoration work, mechanical repairs, and the progress of bringing the car back to life. Which stage of a restoration do you enjoy watching most?

media:content.media:title: Rust to Running Mustang
media:content.media:description: Follow the transformation of a classic Ford Mustang from a rusted project into a running vehicle. The video highlights restoration work, mechanical repairs, and the progress of bringing the car back to life. Which stage of a restoration do you enjoy watching most?

item.title: $70 Amazon Welder Test
item.description: We put the bargain box to work and let the sparks tell the truth. A practical garage test of a budget welder and what it can do in the shop. How would you put it to work?

media:content.media:title: $70 Amazon Welder Test
media:content.media:description: We put the bargain box to work and let the sparks tell the truth. A practical garage test of a budget welder and what it can do in the shop. How would you put it to work?

item.title: Forgotten Rig Restoration
item.description: Watch the moment a forgotten rig decides it’s not done yet. A simple restoration moment with diesel character and satisfying garage work. What changed to bring it back?

media:content.media:title: Forgotten Rig Restoration
media:content.media:description: Watch the moment a forgotten rig decides it’s not done yet. A simple restoration moment with diesel character and satisfying garage work. What changed to bring it back?

item.title: Come See the Edison RAM
item.description: Come see the Edison RAM on July 25. A straightforward look at the truck and the build behind it. What details stand out most?

media:content.media:title: Come See the Edison RAM
media:content.media:description: Come see the Edison RAM on July 25. A straightforward look at the truck and the build behind it. What details stand out most?

item.title: This Super Bee Should Not Be a Truck
item.description: A look at the restoration and project-car work behind this Super Bee as it changes from build to road use. What did it become on the road?

media:content.media:title: This Super Bee Should Not Be a Truck
media:content.media:description: A look at the restoration and project-car work behind this Super Bee as it changes from build to road use. What did it become on the road?
